name: Marcus He
shortBio: Covers visa and transit questions, travel readiness, and family-oriented trip planning where rules and practicality need to work together.
fullBio: Marcus He is the entry and family editor at China Travel Notes. He focuses on visa-free transit and entry-sensitive content, as well as family-facing planning where pace, eligibility, comfort, and day structure all need to be handled carefully. His work is aimed at reducing the highest-stakes uncertainty before departure.
reviewProcess: Marcus reviews pages for policy sensitivity, family practicality, pacing risk, and whether a page gives readers enough clarity before they commit money, timing, or a more fragile itinerary shape.
seoDescription: Read entry, family, and travel-readiness coverage by Marcus He at China Travel Notes.
